proposed_lanes.title: Cross-Cutting IPC Reliability and Safety
proposed_lanes.description: Fix fire-and-forget IPC write races, add schema validation, add null guards on sync.data across 3 components.

proposed_lanes.title: MCP Management — Critical Fixes
proposed_lanes.description: Fix MCP edit onSave (silent discard), dual source of truth (SDK vs store), nested dialog portal conflict, empty catch on auth.remove, silent data wipe.

proposed_lanes.title: Agent Configuration — Critical Fixes
proposed_lanes.description: Fix temperature 0/top_p 0 silently dropped, undefined id deletes ALL agents, missing delete confirmation, sortBy crash on undefined name.

proposed_lanes.title: MCP Management — Hardening
proposed_lanes.description: Add local server support, error handlers, navigation guards, URL validation, IPC try/catch, edit race fix, timeout validation, double-click guard.

proposed_lanes.title: Agent Configuration — Hardening
proposed_lanes.description: Fix async save toast timing, edit-while-deleted silent no-op, crypto fallback, locale-dependent number parsing.

proposed_lanes.title: Plugin Management — Hardening
proposed_lanes.description: Fix i18n raw keys, cancel button missing onClick, Switch label rendering.

proposed_lanes.title: GitHub Integration — Hardening
proposed_lanes.description: Wire actual PR API calls from renderer, add safeStorage fallback, OAuth Map eviction, CI/CD polling, i18n for 15 locales.

proposed_lanes.title: Subagent Delegation — UX Polish
proposed_lanes.description: Add group headers to @popover, fix delegate/agent non-deterministic ordering.

proposed_lanes.title: Context Display — Fixes
proposed_lanes.description: Fix useSessionLayout crash when outside session page, null usage displayed as 0%.

how_to_run_this_session.orchestrator_instruction: This session addresses 77 follow-up issues from Phase 2. The issues are already grouped into 9 independent lanes above. Launch all cartographers immediately in Wave 1 — no sequential work. The greenfields-expansion, mcp-hardening, subagent-ux, and context-fixes lanes are fully independent with zero shared file contention. The cross-cutting, agent-config, mcp-crash, and plugin-hardening lanes share ipc.ts and dialog-manage-files — use produce_fragment for those. The read_from/heartbeat from prior session artifacts is at docs/json/opencode/sessions/current/follow-up-issues.v1.json.

wave_1_cartography.description: Fan out 9 cartographers simultaneously — one per lane.

how_to_run_this_session.conflict_resolution: Use produce_fragment for ipc.ts. Direct additive edits for dialog files since each lane touches different sections.
